problem: DURING FLIGHT, ADVISORY CAME ON, CARBON MONOXIDE DETECTOR INOPERATIVE.
action: RAN A/C POWER FOR 2 HOURS. SHOOK WING & WIGGLED WIRING AT CO DETECTOR. COULD NOT DUPLICATE DISCREPANCY.

action: TESTED, INSPECTED.

problem: CO LEVEL HIGH ANNUNCIATOR WENT OFF SHORTLY AFTER ENGINE START. RECYCLED AVIONICS, OPENED WINDOWS & CO LEVEL HIGH STILL WENT OFF.

problem: SD CARB MISSING IN MFD.
action: FORMATTED & INSTALLED SD CARD.

problem: HIGH CO ILLUMINATED & EXTINGUISHED AFTER SOME TIME.

problem: PFD ADVISORY: CARBON MONOXIDE DETECTOR INOP.

problem: CO DET FAIL MESSAGE.
action: RELOADED G1000 SOFTWARE VERSION 563.26, TESTED & CONFIGURED. CHECKS GOOD.

action: INSPECTED CO DETECTOR INSTALLATION & WIRING, NO DEFECTS NOTED. CO DETECTOR STATUS PAGE CHECKS OK.

problem: CO ALERT WENT OFF A TOTAL OF 4 TIMES DURING FLIGHT.
action: INSPECTED EXHAUST SYSTEM, CABIN HEAT SYSTEM. RAN A/C W/ CARBON MONOXIDE DETECTOR. INSPECTED CO DETECTOR. NO DEFECTS NOTED.

action: REAM .4995"; #1-NO RES, MIN CARB. #2-HEAVY RES, EXCESSIVE CARB. #3-NO RES, MIN CARB. #4-NO RES, MIN CARB.

action: INSPECTED.

action: PERFORMED ENGINE RUN FOR SEVERLA MINUTES & COULD NOT DUPLICATE DISCREP. CO LEVELS VERIFED W/ PORTABLE CO DETECTOR & FOUND TO BE ACCEPTABLE VALUES. NO OTHER DEFECTS NOTED AT THIS TIME, AFTER VISUALLY INSPECTING MUFFLER & SHROUD.

problem: BOLTS FOR CARB AIR BOX ADAPTER ARE LOOSE.

problem: CARBON MONOXIDE DETECTOR FAILURE, WOULD INTERMITTENTLY FLASH ON ALERT TAB.

problem: L/H MIXTURE CONTROL NOT REACHING STOP ON CARB.

problem: "CARBON MONOXIDE DETECTOR INOP" INDICATOR CAME ON MULTIPLE TIMES IN FLIGHT.

problem: L/H CARB HEAT VALVE FELT MISSING.

action: RAN UP A/C, OPS & LEAK CK GOOD.
